title: Azure Storage account configuration
description: Per-storage-account hardening posture captured read-only from Azure Resource Manager (ARM Reader role): encryption-at-rest, secure-transfer (HTTPS-only) / minimum TLS version, and public-blob-access state. Account configuration only — never blob/object contents, access keys, or SAS tokens.

account_id.description: ARM resource id of the storage account.

subscription_id.description: Subscription the storage account lives in.

resource_group.description: Resource group containing the storage account.

location.description: Azure region of the storage account.

encryption_enabled.description: Encryption-at-rest is configured for the account.

encryption_key_source.description: Key source for encryption at rest (Microsoft.Storage | Microsoft.Keyvault).

https_traffic_only.description: Secure-transfer-required: only HTTPS traffic is accepted.

minimum_tls_version.description: Minimum TLS version the account accepts (e.g. TLS1_2).

allow_blob_public_access.description: Whether anonymous public blob access is permitted on the account.
